hero.title: The Start of Your Perfect Event Begins Here
hero.subtitle: Discover why a digital invitation is the best way to surprise your guests.

benefits.title: Why choose a digital invitation?
items: Eco-friendly & Cost-effective: No printing or shipping costs.
Interactive: Integrated maps, countdowns, and instant RSVP.
Real-time Updates: Keep guests informed of any last-minute changes instantly.

benefits.title: Why choose Luvia Design?
items: Premium Style: Minimalist and elegant designs that reflect the importance of your event.
Advanced Technology: Smart use of QR codes, calendar links, and flawless guest management.
Personalized Attention: We take care of every visual and functional detail.

models.title: Wedding

models.title: Quinceañera

cta.title: Planning a different event?
cta.description: We also customize invitations for Graduations, Baby Showers, Baptisms, Birthdays, and more. Designed just for you.

reviews.text: Incredible! Our wedding invitation turned out beautifully. All our guests praised the design.
reviews.author: Maria & Carlos

reviews.text: The interactive map and gift registry made organization so much easier. Highly professional.
reviews.author: The Gomez Family

reviews.text: My daughter's Sweet 15 looked spectacular from the moment we sent the link.
reviews.author: Laura M.

faq.question: How far in advance should I send my digital invitations?
faq.answer: We recommend sending them 4 to 6 weeks before the event to give guests time to RSVP through our automated form.

faq.question: Can I track who confirms their attendance (RSVP)?
faq.answer: Yes! Our system collects your guests' confirmations and organizes them so you can keep exact track without the stress.

faq.question: What happens if I need to change the location or time?
faq.answer: That is the biggest advantage of digital invitations. We can update the information in the system, and the invitation link will reflect the changes instantly for all your guests.
